graduate.objectivesSubtitle: The PhD in Law (Public Law or Private Law) aims to provide students with the following advanced knowledge and skills:

graduate.programDimensionsText: Knowledge dimension, specialization dimension, and purposeful research dimension
graduate.graduationText: Upon successfully completing graduation requirements, the researcher is awarded the PhD in Public or Private Law after at least 6 semesters from the start of study.
graduate.creditsText: During the study period, the researcher completes 90 credit hours, including:
graduate.creditsBullet1: 27 credit hours allocated to coursework during the first three semesters
graduate.creditsBullet2: 63 credit hours allocated to the PhD thesis

conference.title: GITBPDE 2027
conference.fullTitle: 10th International Conference on Global Innovations in Technology, Business Practices and Digital Education
conference.aboutText: The 10th Interdisciplinary International Conference on Global Innovations in Technology, Business Practices and Digital Education (GITBPDE) aims to establish as a regional hub for recent innovation in technology, business innovation practices and digital education. The conference aligns with Oman Vision 2040 by promoting knowledge-based industries and sustainable business practices and digital transformation in education.
conference.scopeText: The conference focuses on cutting-edge research, innovations, and practical applications at the intersection of global trends in innovative technologies, business practices, and digital education. It bridges the gap between theoretical advances and real-world deployment, providing a platform for interdisciplinary knowledge exchange, collaborative research, and discussion of emerging trends shaping the future of business, technology, and digital education.
conference.tracksSubtitle: Original research contributions, case studies, and industrial experiences are welcome in the following areas
conference.contactDesc: For any questions regarding submissions, registration, or general conference inquiries, please reach out to us.
conference.rights: © 2025 Al-Buraimi University College · GITBPDE 2027 · All rights reserved
conference.g1: All submissions must be original, unpublished, and not under review elsewhere.
conference.g2: Papers should be in English, formatted according to IEEE template (5–8 pages including references).
conference.g3: Submissions should include title, abstract (250–300 words), keywords, author details, and affiliation.
conference.g4: Papers should follow APA 7th edition citation style.
conference.g5: Abstracts are not accepted — only full paper submission.
conference.g6: Authors will be notified within 15 working days.
